title: Aggressive AI Wall Street
objective: Find a concentrated AI and technology leadership sleeve that compounds faster than broad large-cap market exposure without faking robustness.
summary: Aggressive concentrated-tech research lane. A real bench leader exists, but it still has not beaten the promoted stock reference honestly or cleared quality gates.
last_meaningful_change: Dynamic Top 6 became the current aggressive leader after the first focused AI/tech screen batch.
promotion_target: Clear bench quality gates and earn paper eligibility without relying on one hot AI tape.

baseline.why: Aggressive AI benchmarks against QQQ, but the promoted broad-stock reference is still the honest stock baseline every concentrated challenger must beat before it earns promotion pressure of its own.

leader_comparison_to_baseline.summary: Dynamic Top 6's current result bundle spans a different benchmark and validation-window shape than the promoted stock reference, so the gap has not been quantified honestly yet.

campaign_pressure.summary: Dynamic Top 6 leads internally but still fails the era sweep. Leader in bench, not in promotion.

gates.label: Minimum trade count
gates.summary: 223 trades across the current leader window.

gates.label: Profit factor
gates.summary: Gross profit still clears the promotable floor.

gates.label: Profitable folds
gates.summary: The current leader still clears the minimum profitable-fold floor.

gates.label: Max drawdown bound
gates.summary: Drawdown still breaches the promotable bound on the current leader run.

gates.label: Beats benchmark
gates.summary: Leader still trails the configured benchmark comparison on the current window.

gates.label: Expectancy decay
gates.summary: The current leader's single-window expectancy decay check passed.

gates.label: Held-out window
gates.summary: No final held-out window is configured for this campaign run yet.

gates.label: Era sweep
gates.summary: The current leader failed all five published era windows, so the bench lead is not promotion-grade yet.

runner_up_gap.summary: Leader and runner-up are still clustered in exploratory territory; neither has earned promotion pressure yet.

family_groups.title: Dynamic Tech Screens
family_groups.summary: Month-frozen or screen-driven universes that keep the candidate set concentrated in current AI and software leadership.

family_groups.title: Regime-Gated Momentum
family_groups.summary: The promoted broad-stock reference family this campaign must beat, and the momentum lineage the current aggressive screen variants still trace back to.

candidates.title: Frozen Reference

latest_run.summary: Promoted broad-stock reference used as the baseline every aggressive AI challenger must clear before it earns real promotion pressure.

notes: This is the stock baseline for aggressive challengers, not the leader of the AI thesis itself.

candidates.title: Dynamic Top 6

latest_run.summary: Current aggressive leader. Still failed quality gates across the era sweep, so this is a bench leader, not a promotion candidate yet.

notes: This is the sharpest expression of the aggressive AI thesis currently checked in.
Leader status here does not imply promotion readiness.

candidates.title: Dynamic Top 8

latest_run.summary: Broader aggressive challenger using the same frozen stop/target structure on a wider top-8 AI/tech screen.

notes: Useful as the immediate breadth check against the top-6 concentration bet.

candidates.title: Dynamic Tech Screen

latest_run.summary: Dynamic aggressive screen using the same regime-aware momentum engine with a broader rotating tech leadership universe.

notes: Keeps the campaign from over-anchoring on one specific top-N concentration choice.

change_log.title: Promoted stock baseline attached
change_log.detail: The aggressive AI campaign now explicitly measures its internal leader against the promoted stock reference instead of only comparing AI challengers to each other.

change_log.title: Dynamic Top 6 took the lead
change_log.detail: The first aggressive AI/tech batch gave Dynamic Top 6 the internal lead, but the campaign remains exploratory because the era results still fail quality gates.

change_log.title: Campaign manifest checked in
change_log.detail: Bench Campaigns now model this thesis as a first-class research program instead of leaving the candidates as disconnected passports.
